body:
🧹 Nitpick comments (1)
lib/screens/calendar_screen.dart (1)
`952-1030`: _📐 Maintainability & Code Quality_ | _🔵 Trivial_ | _⚡ Quick win_ **Duplicated tint/fill computation between `_EventBlock` and `_AllDayBand`'s tile.** The `type == null ? style.fill : tintForType(colorFromHex(type.colorHex), theme.brightness, style.fill)` conditional (and the matching `'${title}, ${type?.name ?? 'No type'}'` semantics-label pattern) is repeated verbatim in both widgets. Extracting a shared helper avoids the two call sites silently diverging later (e.g. if the tint calibration changes again per Decision 19's history of amendments).
♻️ Proposed extraction ```diff // lib/util/event_type_palette.dart +/// The tile/block fill for [type]: the mono no-type [baseFill], or a hue tint via +/// [tintForType] when typed. Centralizes the fill rule so callers can't diverge. +Color fillForType(EventType? type, Brightness b, Color baseFill) => type == null + ? baseFill + : tintForType(colorFromHex(type.colorHex), b, baseFill); ``` ```diff // lib/screens/calendar_screen.dart (_EventBlock.build) - final fill = type == null - ? style.fill - : tintForType( - colorFromHex(type.colorHex), - theme.brightness, - style.fill, - ); + final fill = fillForType(type, theme.brightness, style.fill); ``` ```diff // lib/screens/calendar_screen.dart (_AllDayBand tile) - decoration: BoxDecoration( - color: e.type == null - ? style.fill - : tintForType( - colorFromHex(e.type!.colorHex), - theme.brightness, - style.fill, - ), + decoration: BoxDecoration( + color: fillForType(e.type, theme.brightness, style.fill), ```
Also applies to: 1079-1113
🤖 Prompt for AI Agents ``` Verify each finding against current code. Fix only still-valid issues, skip the rest with a brief reason, keep changes minimal, and validate. In `@lib/screens/calendar_screen.dart` around lines 952 - 1030, Extract the duplicated event-type fill calculation and semantics label construction from _EventBlock and _AllDayBand into shared private helpers, then replace both call sites with those helpers. Preserve the existing tintForType/colorFromHex behavior, null-type fallback, and “No type” label so future Decision 19 changes are centralized. ```
🤖 Prompt for all review comments with AI agents ``` Verify each finding against current code. Fix only still-valid issues, skip the rest with a brief reason, keep changes minimal, and validate. Nitpick comments: In `@lib/screens/calendar_screen.dart`: - Around line 952-1030: Extract the duplicated event-type fill calculation and semantics label construction from _EventBlock and _AllDayBand into shared private helpers, then replace both call sites with those helpers. Preserve the existing tintForType/colorFromHex behavior, null-type fallback, and “No type” label so future Decision 19 changes are centralized. ```
---
